/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/breakout.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout.dir/src/Ball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout.dir/src/Paddle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout.dir/src/Brick.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout.dir/src/PowerUp.cpp.o -o breakout  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libraylib.so.6.0.0 -lenet -lm
